item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.86,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"试剂借用漏填，门口安排值守"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"仪器预约冲突，系统外增人工核对"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"废液交接混乱，台账旁放复查人"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天样本冷藏卡住，请在冰箱旁设确认人"}],"abstain_reason":""}
